name: Document Editor
description: Rich text block editor with real-time collaboration support. CRDT-based synchronization, floating toolbar, slash commands, and remote cursor overlay.

standard.description: Full-featured block editor with toolbar, slash commands, and collaboration features

minimal.description: Focused writing mode with minimal UI

visual_brief: Contenteditable block-based document area occupying the main content region. Each block (paragraph, heading, list, image, code) is a discrete editable unit. A floating formatting toolbar appears on text selection. Typing '/' at the start of a block opens a slash command menu. Remote collaborator cursors appear as colored caret lines with name labels. Remote selections render as colored highlights. The top area may include a document title field. Minimal preset hides all chrome except the content. Presentation preset uses larger type sizes and hides editing UI.

layout_hints.editing_focus: The editor surface should feel like one primary work plane. Floating toolbars, slash menus, and collaborator overlays should support that plane without fragmenting it.
layout_hints.overlay_discipline: Selection toolbars, cursors, and slash menus should not obscure the active text block more than necessary.
layout_hints.document_measure: Keep the editable column at a comfortable reading and writing width even when the surrounding workspace is wide.

responsive.mobile: Full-width editor with bottom-fixed formatting toolbar above the keyboard. Slash menu takes full width. Remote cursors show abbreviated names.
responsive.tablet: Standard editor layout. Floating toolbar near selection. Comfortable block spacing.
responsive.desktop: Full editor with generous margins. Floating toolbar tracks selection precisely. All collaboration indicators visible.

motion.micro: Selection toolbar, slash menu, and collaborator cursor states may animate softly over 120-180ms.
motion.transitions: Block insertions, slash-menu reveals, and comment-entry states should feel smooth and responsive without turning the editor into a motion-heavy surface.

keyboard: Tab moves between title, editor tooling, and contextual editing controls.
Slash-menu and formatting controls should remain keyboard navigable.
announcements: Formatting changes, collaborator presence, and structural insertions should be announced in a concise way.
accessibility.focus_management: Do not steal focus from the active editor block when collaboration indicators update. Floating controls should return focus to the editor after action completion.

composition.DocEditor: Container(d-section, flex-col, full-height, relative) > [CursorsLayer + SelectionsLayer + ContentArea + FloatingToolbar? + SlashMenu? + MentionPopup?]
